trigger.description: Shard fan-out is enabled, no EE_SHARDS_DIR override is set, and neither XDG_DATA_HOME nor HOME is available for default path derivation.
trigger.invocation: env -u XDG_DATA_HOME -u HOME EE_SHARD_FANOUT_ENABLED=1 ee status --workspace . --json

expected_emission.repair_string: Set XDG_DATA_HOME, HOME, or EE_SHARDS_DIR before enabling shard fan-out.
